intent: Contenitore responsive per una tabella dati
style: it-table .agid-table-wrap{overflow-x:auto} it-table table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%} it-table caption{caption-side:top;text-align:left;color:var(--it-color-muted);padding-bottom:.5rem} it-table th,it-table td{text-align:left;padding:.5em .75em;border:1px solid var(--it-color-border)} it-table thead th{background:var(--it-color-info-bg)}
